world_summary: A bounded opening-night world where checklist visibility, lighting faults, and queue pressure compete under a fixed preview schedule.

world_summary_i18n.zh-CN: 一个受约束的开馆夜世界：清单可见性、照明故障和排队压力在固定预演节奏下相互竞争。

baseline_description: The baseline assumes the printed opening checklist reaches the lobby on time and the team can decide on a safety hold without extra disruption.

baseline_description_i18n.zh-CN: 基线假设纸质开馆清单能按时送达大厅，团队也能在不额外扰动的情况下决定是否进入安全暂停。

perturbation_options.title: Delay the opening checklist
perturbation_options.description: Delay the printed checklist before it reaches the public handoff.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 让纸质开馆清单在进入公开交接点之前晚一点到达。

perturbation_options.summary: Delay the printed checklist before it reaches the lobby handoff.

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 让纸质开馆清单晚一点进入大厅交接。

perturbation_options.title: Block the first hold signal
perturbation_options.description: Block the first direct warning to the curator.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 阻断送往策展负责人的第一条直接预警。

perturbation_options.summary: Block the first warning path toward the curator.

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 阻断通往策展负责人的第一条预警路径。

perturbation_options.title: Degrade the early lighting window
perturbation_options.description: Create a short communication/resource failure while the lighting risk is still being assessed.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 在照明风险仍在评估时制造一次短暂的通信/资源故障。

perturbation_options.summary: Degrade the early lighting warning window.

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 让早期照明预警窗口变得更脆弱。
